name: Today
detailedForecast: Rain and patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms before 11am, then rain likely and a chance of thunderstorms and patchy fog between 11am and 5pm, then rain likely and patchy fog and a slight chance of thunderstorms. Cloudy, with a high near 60. South wind 13 to 16 mph, with gusts as high as 33 mph. Chance of precipitation is 100%. New rainfall amounts between 1 and 2 inches possible.
